channel.name: Choppy Toast / AI Coding Tools Directory 2026

submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free and open-source AI coding workflow system for developers who want plan-build-verify loops and reviewable repo-native handoffs instead of another raw chat session.

why_this_action: Codeberg adoption is flat and the current audit says to replace stale content motion with Codeberg-primary third-party citations. Choppy Toast's AI Coding Tools Directory is a live, high-intent comparison surface for people actively evaluating Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, and OpenCode, so curator outreach here is a stronger fit than another generic directory submission or another Reddit comment.

verification.target_page_note: The directory is live and indexes AI coding tools with comparison intent.
verification.contact_proof: mailto:choppy.young@gmail.com exposed in https://choppytoast.com homepage source

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, live directory inclusion, or a visible third-party citation/backlink that points evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by the review date, do not resend the same pitch; replace it with a different untouched high-intent comparison or curator surface.
